nasb.text: All these were the sons of Asher, heads of the fathers’ houses, choice and mighty men of valor, heads of the princes. And the number of them enrolled by genealogy for service in war was 26,000 men.

esv.text: All of these were men of Asher, heads of fathers’ houses, approved, mighty warriors, chiefs of the princes. Their number enrolled by genealogies, for service in war, was 26,000 men.

cnv.text: 這都是亞設的子孫，是他們各家族的首領，是傑出英勇的戰士，是領袖中的首領；按著家譜登記的數目，能上陣作戰的共有二萬六千人。

ccb.text: 这些都是亚设的后代。他们都是族长，是英勇的战士和杰出的首领。按照家谱的记载，他们宗族中可以出征作战的共有两万六千人。
